name: pza-skills
description: Portable multi-reviewer agent skills for code review, plan verification, hook auditing, agent-guidance maintenance, and reviewer settings.

interface.shortDescription: Multi-reviewer skills for code review and plan verification
interface.longDescription: Use PZA-skills to run multi-lane code completion checks, verify implementation plans against local repository evidence, audit hook-worthy workflow patterns, maintain agent guidance, and configure optional reviewer backends through a shared local runtime.
defaultPrompt: Verify this implementation plan with PZA-skills
